info.title: DeepRen
info.description: Utility to rename files, directories, and replace text in file contents using regular expressions

hookCapture.patchTarget: Execute-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

options.name: --filter
options.description: File search pattern to filter the file names to be renamed.

options.name: --whatif
options.description: If specified, allows to simulate the changes done, outputting the results without making any change.

arguments.name: DirectoryPath
arguments.description: The directory path in which the renamings and replacings shall be made.

arguments.name: FindPattern
arguments.description: Regular Expression to be found in the paths and contents.

arguments.name: ReplacementText
arguments.description: Text which will replace the matches of the Find Pattern.
